name: prforge-local-watch
description: Watches local PRForge repo/session state: git drift, dirty worktree, review updates, test status, approval integrity, branch upstream, hook health, context pressure. Runs on every PRForge session.

name: prforge-mesh-watch
description: Unified mesh monitor. Silently tracks node state and queue. Worker mode: emits job directive only when idle+completed for 3+ min and a new job is assigned. Coordinator mode: emits approval directive only when idle 3+ min and a submission_ready job exists. Never interrupts mid-workflow. Role determined by ~/.prforge-mesh/my-node-id.
